item.title: ULA rocket has booster problem while launching classified Space Force payloads
item.description: A United Launch Alliance Vulcan rocket carrying classified Space Force payloads suffered a booster problem but apparently made an otherwise "nominal" ...

item.title: U.S., Mexico seize tons of cocaine in "coordinated" Pacific operation
item.description: President Trump has threatened to slap additional tariffs on Mexico to pressure the country into beefing up drug raids and cartel arrests.

item.title: Trump's EPA is revoking the "endangerment finding." Here's what to know.
item.description: The Trump administration says greenhouse gases emitted from sources like cars, trucks and power plants will no longer by regulated by the federal gove...

item.title: 2/11: CBS Evening News
item.description: The search for Savannah Guthrie’s mother intensifies; In House hearing, Attorney General Pam Bondi faces heavy criticism over Epstein files release.

item.title: Gun accessory company to pay $1.75M to Buffalo mass shooting victims
item.description: The agreement with Mean Arms settles a lawsuit and covers claims from various victims' families and survivors of the 2022 attack at Tops Friendly Mark...
